title: Jupyter Notebook Collaboration Settings
description: Configuration for real-time collaborative editing features including user preferences, feature toggles, and synchronization settings

enableCollaboration.title: Enable Collaboration
enableCollaboration.description: Enable real-time collaborative editing features for this notebook session

autoConnectToSession.title: Auto-connect to Collaboration Session
autoConnectToSession.description: Automatically connect to collaborative session when opening a notebook

updateFrequency.title: Update Frequency (ms)
updateFrequency.description: Frequency of synchronization updates in milliseconds (affects performance vs. real-time responsiveness)

awarenessUpdateInterval.title: Awareness Update Interval (ms)
awarenessUpdateInterval.description: Interval for broadcasting user presence and cursor position updates

connectionTimeout.title: Connection Timeout (ms)
connectionTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for initial collaboration connection

enablePresenceAwareness.title: Enable User Presence Awareness
enablePresenceAwareness.description: Show cursor positions and selections of other collaborators

enableCellLocking.title: Enable Cell Locking
enableCellLocking.description: Allow users to lock cells for exclusive editing access

enableChangeHistory.title: Enable Change History
enableChangeHistory.description: Track change history and version control for collaborative editing

enableComments.title: Enable Comments System
enableComments.description: Allow users to add comments and discussions to notebook cells

enablePermissions.title: Enable Permissions System
enablePermissions.description: Enforce access control and permission management for collaborative editing

showCollaborationStatusBar.title: Show Collaboration Status Bar
showCollaborationStatusBar.description: Display collaboration status bar showing active users and connection status

showUserPresenceIndicators.title: Show User Presence Indicators
showUserPresenceIndicators.description: Display visual indicators for user cursors and selections

showCellLockIndicators.title: Show Cell Lock Indicators
showCellLockIndicators.description: Display visual indicators for locked cells

maxConcurrentUsers.title: Maximum Concurrent Users
maxConcurrentUsers.description: Maximum number of users allowed in a single collaboration session

lockAcquisitionTimeout.title: Lock Acquisition Timeout (ms)
lockAcquisitionTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait when acquiring a cell lock

retryConnectionAttempts.title: Retry Connection Attempts
retryConnectionAttempts.description: Number of times to retry connection to collaboration server

enableOfflineEditing.title: Enable Offline Editing
enableOfflineEditing.description: Allow editing when disconnected from collaboration server (changes will sync when reconnected)

enableConflictResolution.title: Enable Conflict Resolution
enableConflictResolution.description: Enable automatic conflict resolution using CRDT algorithms

saveHistorySnapshots.title: Save History Snapshots
saveHistorySnapshots.description: Save periodic snapshots of document state for version history

historySnapshotInterval.title: History Snapshot Interval (minutes)
historySnapshotInterval.description: Interval for creating automatic history snapshots

userJoinedSession.title: User Joined Session
userJoinedSession.description: Show notification when a user joins the collaboration session

userLeftSession.title: User Left Session
userLeftSession.description: Show notification when a user leaves the collaboration session

cellLocked.title: Cell Locked
cellLocked.description: Show notification when a cell is locked by another user

commentAdded.title: Comment Added
commentAdded.description: Show notification when a comment is added to a cell

permissionChanged.title: Permission Changed
permissionChanged.description: Show notification when notebook permissions are modified

showUserAvatars.title: Show User Avatars
showUserAvatars.description: Display user avatars in presence indicators

showUserNames.title: Show User Names
showUserNames.description: Display user names in presence indicators

cursorColorScheme.title: Cursor Color Scheme
cursorColorScheme.description: Color scheme for user cursors and selections

statusBarPosition.title: Status Bar Position
statusBarPosition.description: Position of the collaboration status bar

compactMode.title: Compact Mode
compactMode.description: Use compact layout for collaboration UI elements

enableBatchUpdates.title: Enable Batch Updates
enableBatchUpdates.description: Batch multiple updates together for better performance

batchUpdateInterval.title: Batch Update Interval (ms)
batchUpdateInterval.description: Interval for batching updates when batch mode is enabled

enableCompressionUpdates.title: Enable Compression
enableCompressionUpdates.description: Compress update payloads for better network performance

maxUpdateHistory.title: Maximum Update History
maxUpdateHistory.description: Maximum number of updates to keep in memory for conflict resolution

enableDebugMode.title: Enable Debug Mode
enableDebugMode.description: Enable detailed logging for collaboration events

logLevel.title: Log Level
logLevel.description: Logging level for collaboration debug information

showConnectionMetrics.title: Show Connection Metrics
showConnectionMetrics.description: Display connection performance metrics in the status bar
